title: ferray-autodiff: god file — 1866 lines in single lib.rs
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

The entire crate is a single lib.rs with 7 distinct responsibilities: struct definition, operator impls (DualNumber-DualNumber and DualNumber-scalar), 30+ differentiable methods, 16 free functions, num_traits impls (Zero, One, Num, NumCast, Float, etc.), convenience API (derivative, gradient), and 100+ lines of tests. Split into modules: dual.rs (struct + arithmetic), functions.rs (differentiable methods), traits.rs (num_traits impls), api.rs (derivative/gradient).
